infoPlist.NSUserNotificationsUsageDescription: Coho uses notifications for family reminders, upcoming events, daily recaps, and Family Places alerts.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Coho reads only the iPhone calendars you select so your household can coordinate approved events.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsWriteOnlyAccessUsageDescripti: Coho can add events you approve to the iPhone calendar you choose.

plugins.photosPermission: Coho uses your selected photo as a family member's profile picture.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Coho uses your location only when you choose to share it with your household or create a Family Place.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Coho uses background location only after you enable live sharing and arrival or departure alerts.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Coho uses background location only after you enable live sharing and arrival or departure alerts.
